default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, technical improvements, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Redirects for first batch of pages to be completed today; GrowthX to assist with batches 2 and 3](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [New index pages to be created for services, streamlining footer links and improving site structure](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Mental health services page to be developed, using existing template with modifications](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [New content strategy for ketamine therapy introduced, focusing on building topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Redirects: First batch to be completed today; GrowthX to help with batches 2 and 3](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Index pages: New pages to be created for services, replacing multiple state links in footer](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Breadcrumbs: To be added to pages, improving site structure](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [City pages: Need to ensure all cities with "bubbles" have corresponding pages](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Providers: To be added to state-level ketamine pages, similar to mental health pages](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### Mental Health Services Page Development

  - [New page to be created, using existing service page template as a base](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Will serve as an umbrella page, highlighting all mental health services offered](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide wireframe and copy suggestions by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### Content Strategy for Ketamine Therapy

  - [New approach focuses on building topical authority around specific services](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Content bucketed into three categories: general awareness, treatment access, and therapy for specific conditions](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Strategy designed to be scalable and applicable to other services (e.g., EMDR, psychedelic integration)](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Aims to cover the entire user journey from awareness to high-intent queries](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=2140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete first batch of redirects and begin work on batches 2 and 3](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Create new index pages for services and update footer links](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Develop mental health services page based on GrowthX wireframe (expected early next week)](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Review and approve ketamine therapy content strategy and proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
  - [Begin implementing new content strategy, starting with ketamine therapy articles](https://fathom.video/share/hTZnxdVv5uTzncHrwpyqrYktJKnNrXpx?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
